evals.prompt: Render this infographic brief as a sketchnote-style Excalidraw scene. The brief is at {workspace}/eval-sketchnote-brief/infographic-brief.md. Save outputs to {workspace}/eval-sketchnote-brief/with_skill/outputs/
evals.expected_output: Hand-drawn sketchnote infographic in Excalidraw with all 6 content blocks, icons, chart, flowing arrows, dashed borders, warm feel

evals.prompt: Render this infographic brief as an Economist-style editorial page using Pencil MCP. The brief is at {workspace}/eval-economist-brief/infographic-brief.md. Save outputs to {workspace}/eval-economist-brief/with_skill/outputs/
evals.expected_output: Pixel-precise editorial .pen file with cream background, Economist red accent, sharp corners, proportional bar chart, dense newspaper-like layout

evals.prompt: Render this comparison-layout infographic brief as a whiteboard-style Excalidraw scene. The brief is at {workspace}/eval-comparison-brief/infographic-brief.md. Save outputs to {workspace}/eval-comparison-brief/with_skill/outputs/
evals.expected_output: Clean whiteboard infographic with side-by-side comparison columns, minimal color, strong contrast between before/after, clear reading flow
